# t0lkim.dev

> Mike Lott — Cybersecurity & Operational Engineering

## About the Author

Cybersecurity leader with 15+ years of experience in Security Architecture, Counter-Censorship Engineering, and Infrastructure Security at companies including ExpressVPN, Facebook/Meta, and GoDaddy. CISSP and GSLC certified.

## Projects

- [teen-tidal](https://t0lkim.dev/projects/teen-tidal/): Native iOS parental content filter for Tidal with two-layer explicit content filtering. Built in Swift.
- [pg-harden](https://t0lkim.dev/projects/pg-harden/): PostgreSQL security hardening scanner checking SCRAM auth, SSL, and pg_hba. Built in Rust.
- [TidalPlaylistBuilder](https://t0lkim.dev/projects/tidal-playlist-builder/): Build Tidal playlists from BBC programmes, CSV, and text files. Built in Rust.
- [TheStreamDeck](https://t0lkim.dev/projects/the-stream-deck/): Raspberry Pi streaming audio appliance with touchscreen, VU meters, and 4-source switching.
- [session-manager](https://t0lkim.dev/projects/session-manager/): LLM-agnostic session orchestrator with entity-tag overlap, conflict detection, and relevance-filtered context injection. Built in Rust.
